content: Recommended build order for logistics MIS: (1) Auth/User management first — all modules need authenticated access; (2) Product Master and Supplier Management — reference data that POs and transactions depend on; (3) Inventory/Warehouse module — core operational transactions; (4) Procurement/PO module — references suppliers and products, triggers stock-in on goods receipt; (5) Dashboard and Reporting — reads from all prior tables, built last because it depends on data existing. Integration tests confirm that when a PO is received, the inventory module updates correctly.
